abstract.text: The base class for unacknowledged messages.
The Firmware Update Status message is an unacknowledged message sent by a
Firmware Update Server to report the status of a firmware update.
The Network Keys are used to encrypt mesh messages on the Network Layer.
A Health Fault Clear Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to clear the current Registered Fault
state identified by Company ID of an Element.
A
is an unacknowledged message reporting all
s
bound to requested
that are known to the Node.
The Light LC Mode Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to set the
Light LC Mode state of an Element.
Index of this Application Key, in range from 0 through to 4095.
A Remote Provisioning Link Status message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Server to acknowledge a Remote Provisioning Link Get
message, a Remote Provisioning Link Open message, or a Remote Provisioning
Link Close message.
The base class for vendor response messages.
A type of a mesh message which opcode is known during compilation time.
A Private GATT Proxy Status message is an unacknowledged message used to report
the current Private GATT Proxy state of a Node.
A base protocol for unacknowledged Configuration messages.
A
is an unacknowledged message reporting all
s
known to the Node.
A mesh message containing the operation status.
A Private Beacon Status message is an unacknowledged message used to report
the current Private Beacon state and Random Update Interval Steps state of a Node.
A Remote Provisioning PDU Report message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Server to report the Provisioning PDU that either was
received from the device being provisioned or was generated locally during the
Device Key Refresh procedure, the Node Address Refresh procedure, or the
Node Composition Refresh procedure.
A base protocol for static unacknowledged vendor message.
A Health Fault Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the current Registered Fault
state of an Element.
The base class for response messages.
A
message is an unacknowledged message used to report
the current SAR Transmitter state of a Node.
The base class for vendor response messages.
A Health Attention Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to set the current
Attention Timer state of an Element.
Index of this Network Key, in range from 0 through to 4095.
The Firmware Distribution Receivers Status message is an unacknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Server to report the size of the Distribution Receivers List state.
Light CTL Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to set the
Light CTL Lightness state, Light CTL Temperature state, and the Light CTL Delta UV
state of an Element.
A Private Node Identity Status message is an unacknowledged message used to
report the current Private Node Identity state for a subnet.
A
is an unacknowledged message used to report a status for
the requesting message, based on the
identifying the
on the NetKey List and on the
identifying
the
on the AppKey List.
Light CTL Temperature Range Status is an unacknowledged message used
to report the Light CTL Temperature Range state of an Element.
The base class of every mesh message. Mesh messages can be sent to and
received from the mesh network. For messages with the Op Code known
during compilation a
protocol should be preferred.
A base class for acknowledged messages which opcode and the type of the
response message are known during compilation time.
A
is an unacknowledged message used to report the status of
the operation on the NetKey List.
A Remote Provisioning Scan Report message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Server to report the scanned Device UUID of an
unprovisioned device.
Provision, configure and control Bluetooth mesh devices with nRF Mesh library.
The base class for unacknowledged messages.
The Light LC Mode Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the
Light LC Mode state of an Element.
The base class for response messages with an opcode known at the
compilation time.
The Firmware Distribution Receivers List message is an unacknowledged message sent by
the Firmware Distribution Server to report the firmware distribution status of each receiver.
A Health Attention Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to set the current
Attention Timer state of an Element.
A Health Period Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the Health Fast Period Divisor state of an Element.
The Config Low Power Node PollTimeout Status is an unacknowledged message
used to report the current value of the PollTimeout timer of the Low Power
Node within a Friend Node.
A base protocol for unacknowledged Remote Provisioning messages.
The Light LC Light OnOff Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the
Light LC State Machine Light OnOff state of an Element.
A base protocol for vendor status message.
A Remote Provisioning Extended Scan Start message is an unacknowledged message
that is used by the Remote Provisioning Client to request additional information
about a specific unprovisioned device or about the Remote Provisioning Server itself.
The Firmware Distribution Upload Status message is an unacknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Server to report the status of a firmware image upload.
The Light LC Occupancy Mode Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to
set the Light LC Occupancy Mode state of an Element.
The Light CTL Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the
Light CTL Lightness and the Light CTL Temperature state of an Element.
A Health Current Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the Current Health
state of an Element.
The mesh message security enum determines authentication level
which shall be used when encrypting a segmented mesh message.
A base protocol for vendor messages.
A base protocol for unacknowledged vendor message.
A Remote Provisioning Link Report message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Server to report the state change of a provisioning
bearer link or the Node Provisioning Protocol Interface.
The Firmware Distribution Capabilities Status message is an unacknowledged message
sent by a Firmware Distribution Server to report Distributor capabilities.
A Health Fault Test Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to invoke a self-test procedure
of an Element.
A base protocol for unacknowledged Remote Provisioning messages.
A Remote Provisioning PDU Send message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Client to deliver the Provisioning PDU to an
unprovisioned device or to the Node Provisioning Protocol Interface.
A Remote Provisioning PDU Outbound Report message is an unacknowledged message
used by the Remote Provisioning Server to report completion of the delivery
of the Provisioning PDUs that the Remote Provisioning Server either sends to
a device that is being provisioned or processes locally during the
Device Key Refresh procedure, the Node Address Refresh procedure,
or the Node Composition Refresh procedure.
The Light CTL Temperature Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message
used to set the Light CTL Temperature state and the Light CTL Delta UV state of an Element.
The Light LC Property Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to
set the Light LC Property state of an Element.
The base class of every mesh message. Mesh messages can be sent to and
received from a mesh network.
Application Keys are used to encrypt mesh messages on Access Layer.
The base class for unacknowledged messages with an opcode known at the
compilation time.
Light CTL Temperature Status is an unacknowledged message used to report
the Light CTL Temperature and Light CTL Delta UV state of an Element.
The Light LC Light OnOff Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message
used to set the Light LC Light OnOff state of an Element.
The LC Occupancy Mode Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the
Light LC Occupancy Mode state of an Element.
The base class for response messages.
The Firmware Update Information Status message is an unacknowledged message
used to report information about firmware images installed on a Node.
A base protocol for static vendor message.
The Light LC Property Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the
Light LC Property state of an Element.
The Firmware Update Firmware Metadata Status message is an unacknowledged message
sent to a Firmware Update Client that is used to report whether a Firmware Update Server can
accept a firmware update.
The Firmware Distribution Status message is an unacknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Server to report the status of a firmware image distribution.
A Health Period Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to set the current Health Fast
Period Divisor state of an Element.
How to send mesh messages using the manager.
The base class for acknowledged messages.
Light CTL Temperature Range Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message
used to set the Light CTL Temperature Range state of an Element.
A base protocol for acknowledged vendor message.
A
message is an unacknowledged message used to report the current
SAR Receiver state of a Node.
A Remote Provisioning Scan Capabilities Status message is an unacknowledged
message used by the Remote Provisioning Server to report the current value of
the Remote Provisioning Scan Capabilities state of a Remote Provisioning Server.
The Firmware Distribution Firmware Status message is an unacknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Server to report the status of an operation on a stored firmware image.
A Remote Provisioning Scan Status message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Server to report the current value of the
Remote Provisioning Scan Parameters state and the Remote Provisioning Scan state
of a Remote Provisioning Server model.
